entries.title: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
entries.description: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.

entries.title: Florida AG announces investigation into OpenAI over shooting that allegedly involved ChatGPT
entries.description: ChatGPT had reportedly been used to plan the attack that killed two and injured five at Florida State University last April. The family of one victim has said that they plan to sue OpenAI over the inc

entries.title: After data breach, $10B-valued startup Mercor is having a month
entries.description: After falling victim to a hacker, Mercor is facing lawsuits and reportedly losing big-name customers.

entries.title: Meta AI app climbs to No. 5 on the App Store after Muse Spark launch
entries.description: The app was ranking No. 57 on the App Store just before Meta AI's new model launched. Now it's No. 5 — and rising.

entries.title: Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?

entries.title: Google and Intel deepen AI infrastructure partnership
entries.description: The two tech giants are looking to co-develop custom chips, at a time when demand for CPUs is high due to a growing global shortage.

entries.title: Sierra’s Bret Taylor says the era of clicking buttons is over

entries.title: Trump officials may be encouraging banks to test Anthropic’s Mythos model
entries.description: The report is particularly surprising since the Department of Defense recently declared Anthropic a supply-chain risk.

entries.title: Apple reportedly testing four designs for upcoming smart glasses
entries.description: These glasses are a step back from an ambitious plan that once called for Apple to launch a variety of mixed and augmented reality devices.

entries.title: From LLMs to hallucinations, here’s a simple guide to common AI terms
entries.description: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

entries.title: At the HumanX conference, everyone was talking about Claude
entries.description: Anthropic was the star of the show at San Francisco's AI-centric conference.

entries.title: Sam Altman responds to ‘incendiary’ New Yorker article after attack on his home
entries.description: The OpenAI CEO's new blog post responds to both an apparent attack on his home and an in-depth New Yorker profile raising questions about his trustworthiness.

entries.title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
entries.description: The new features would be geared toward enterprise customers, with better security controls than the famously risky open source OpenClaw agent.

entries.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
entries.description: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.
